name: Mari Nikaidou
description: A witch most famously known as the Witch of Aurora, based off her ancient Aurora attribute. Mari is a selfless girl whose only reason in joining Valhalla was so that she could safeguard the children she grew up with in an orphanage in the outskirts of town. name: Momoharu Hanazono
description: __Initial Height:__ 187 cm The twin brother of Chiaki. He lost interest for Basketball in Junior High after he trained very hard for developing his jump shoot but every shoot that he attempted never went in the basket making him desperate and lose interest on the sport that he loves but after Sora's arrival everything changed, after seeing Sora's devotion for the game made him realize that he never stoped loving playing basketball.

name: Nino Arisugawa
description: Although inattentive and often zoned-out, Arisugawa Nino is very passionate about her singing. Growing up, she and her childhood friend Momo would often sing with each other, usually to drown out the sounds of their parents arguing; however, right after the shock of Momo's disappearance, Nino stopped singing and began having the constant urge to shout instead. Unable to control herself, she began wearing a surgical mask. Later after meeting a boy named Yuzu, Nino was given new faith in her voice

name: Noda
description: Noda is a self-reliant boy who executes the strategies formed by the SSS and fights with a halberd. He is a complete idiot whose weakness is education. name: Oboro Shirakumo
description: Oboro was a man of average stature with light, wavy hair that was swept back to flow upwards above his head, two shorter, ear-length tufts left hanging downwards to frame his face. He usually wore an expression of excitement, possessing a large, teeth-bearing grin and semicircular, inward-tilting eyes that were often squeezed shut. Quirk: **Cloud** (he is capable of moving through the air by creating clouds and riding on them.)

name: Rin Misumi
description: The head of the Disciplinary Committee, she is strongly against Ui Wakana's love campaign, and is often disciplining couples who are hugging or holding hands. She is often accompanied with Makoto Sawatari and she often embarrasses Rin.~!She eventually develops feelings for Hayato after he treats her kindly and helps her out.!~ She joins the Disciplinary Committee because people believed that she would seduce boys with her large chest, and she wished to disclaim that rumor.
